subject: Re:
body:
message received,,, not before 8pm very good

NOTE,.
UPdated President Elect schedule:
Trump Plane to arrive Orlando at 5pm friday for event,. then arrive Palm Beach estimate 10pm,. He usually runs late, so 11pm could be realistic time for his PBI Arrival,.

***the airport only shuts down for 20 min before and after his arrival,.

I'll keep you posted if time changes,.

thx
Larry
